title: Research Response Comments
description: Synthetic starter comment bank for testing research-response review workflows.

comments.label: Relevant source
comments.text: The selected source is relevant to the research question.

comments.label: Citation support needed
comments.text: Add citation information so the reader can identify the source.

comments.label: Specific evidence
comments.text: The response uses specific evidence instead of only a general claim.

comments.label: Explain evidence
comments.text: Explain how the evidence supports the point being made.

comments.label: Logical grouping
comments.text: Related ideas are grouped in a logical way.

comments.label: Transition needed
comments.text: Add a transition to show how this idea connects to the next one.
